# Timeseries Analysis

::: reaxkit.analysis.timeseries.timeseries
    options:
      show_root_heading: false
      show_root_full_path: false
      members: []

## Request: `SimulationScalarSeriesRequest`

<div class="analysis-section-indent" markdown="1">

Request payload for simulation scalar time-series extraction.

### Fields

| Field | Type | Default | Help | Choices |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `field` | `str` |  | Simulation scalar field to extract. | potential_energy, volume, temperature, pressure, density, elapsed_time, num_of_atoms, a, b, c, alpha, beta, gamma |
| `frames` | `Optional[Sequence[int]]` |  | Frames parameter for SimulationScalarSeriesRequest. |  |
| `every` | `int` | 1 | Every parameter for SimulationScalarSeriesRequest. |  |

</div>

## Task: `SimulationScalarSeriesTask`

<div class="analysis-section-indent" markdown="1">

Build a scalar time series from ``SimulationData``.

### Method: `recommended_presentations(_result: SimulationScalarSeriesResult, payload: dict[str, Any])`

<div class="analysis-method-indent" markdown="1">

Recommend default table/plot views for simulation scalar series.

Works on
Analyzer task output for ``simulation_series``.

#### Parameters

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `_result` | `SimulationScalarSeriesResult` | Typed analyzer result instance. |
| `payload` | `dict[str, Any]` | Serialized payload with ``table`` rows. |

#### Returns

| Type | Description |
|---|---|
| `list[PresentationSpec]` | Presentation specs for table and scalar plot rendering. |


</div>

### Method: `run(data: SimulationData, request: SimulationScalarSeriesRequest, reporter=None)`

<div class="analysis-method-indent" markdown="1">

Run scalar simulation-series extraction.

Works on
``SimulationData``.

#### Parameters

| Name | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `data` | `SimulationData` | Parsed simulation scalar dataset. |
| `request` | `SimulationScalarSeriesRequest` | Field and sampling configuration. |
| `reporter` | `Any, optional` | Progress callback accepted by analyzer tasks. |

#### Returns

| Type | Description |
|---|---|
| `SimulationScalarSeriesResult` | Scalar series rows with frame and iteration axes. |


</div>

</div>

## Result: `TimeSeriesResult`

<div class="analysis-section-indent" markdown="1">

Generic result container for in-memory time-series representations.

This base-style result supports reusable analyzers that produce both table
outputs and optional in-memory ``Series`` vectors.

### Fields

| Field | Type | Default | Help | Choices |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `series` | `list[Series]` |  |  |  |
| `x_label` | `str` |  |  |  |
| `y_label` | `str` |  |  |  |
| `request` | `BaseRequest` |  |  |  |
| `table` | `pd.DataFrame` |  |  |  |
| `metadata` | `dict \| None` |  |  |  |

</div>
